title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud presented the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Agent Registry for securely connecting agents to organizational data sources and other agents. The session covers integrating Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, building custom MCP servers, and transforming APIs into agent-ready tools using specification boost add-on.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session demonstrates the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and its Agent Registry for securely connecting agents to organizational data sources and to other agents. It covers integrating Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, building custom MCP servers, and converting existing APIs into agent-ready tools through a specification boost add-on. The focus is agent orchestration: wiring tools, registries, and MCP into a connected system rather than treating an agent as a standalone model.
